description.unified: Deals ATK Physical DMG to enemies in a frontal straight-line area and stuns them for 1sec [1.8 sec->1sec]. Non-hero enemies take additional ATK Physical DMG. [Experiment Success!]: This skill does not trigger a cooldown.

Deals ATK Physical DMG to the target and nearby enemies, inflicting [Explosive Substance] for 7sec, increasing Physical DMG taken by 20% [25%->20%] and inflicting Blind for 1sec [2.4 sec->1sec]. [Experiment Success!]: Removes beneficial effects from enemies within the area.

Attaches a sticky bomb to a random enemy. After 3sec, the bomb explodes, dealing ATK Physical DMG to the target and nearby enemies, and stunning them for 1sec [1.8 sec->1sec]. Enemies afflicted with [Explosive Substance] take additional ATK Physical DMG. [Experiment Success!]: The bomb explodes immediately upon attachment.

When performing a Normal Attack, has a 15% chance to fire a shell, dealing ATK Physical DMG to the target and nearby enemies, and stunning them for 1sec [1.2 sec->1sec]. Each time a skill ends, attempts [Experiment] with a 50% chance to succeed, enhancing the next skill. Enhanced skills do not attempt [Experiment].

dark.unified: Increases the duration of Blind by 1 sec [1.2 sec->1 sec].

light.unified: Mana cost increases by 2000 [1000->2000], and the number of bomb placements is changed to 2.
Shell activation chance increases by 25% [10%->25%], and stun duration increases by 0.5 sec [0.6 sec->0.5 sec].

dark.unified: On [Experiment] success, increases Attack Speed by 12% [300%->12%] and Status Ailment Accuracy by 150 [300->150] for 10 sec.

description.unified: [Experiment] success chance increases by {0}%. On [Experiment] success, Attack increases by {1}%, Attack Speed increases by {2}%, and damage dealt to non-hero enemies increases by {3}%. This effect stacks up to 3 [4->3] times and cannot be dispelled.
